## Summary

Describe the user-facing or contributor-facing change in a few lines.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `docs/scripts/check_links.sh`
- [ ] `docs/scripts/generate_llms_exports.sh`
- [ ] `cargo package --workspace --allow-dirty --no-verify`

## Release Notes

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated when the change is release-facing
- [ ] No changelog entry needed
